steps.title: Identify the slope and y-intercept
steps.content: The slope is given as \$7$. The point $(0, 5)$ tells us the y-intercept: when $x = 0$, $y = 5$, so $b = 5$.

steps.title: Apply slope-intercept form
steps.content:
Use the slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$. Substituting $m = 7$ and $b = 5$:

$$f(x) = 7x + 5$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
